prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别约2298名→2959名→4173名→5198名→4673名。2021至2024年呈持续后移趋势，累计后移约2900名；2025年较2024年明显回升约525名，出现反弹信号，2025年基准位次约4673名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2024年稳定在157–159人，2025年缩减至152人，2026年计划维持152人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第15名→2023年第14名→2024年第12名→2025年第11名→2026年第11名，稳居全国Top20顶尖工科院校行列，对高分考生吸引力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及导师师德失范与学术不端事件（杨昀事件），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第56位（较热），关注度中等；未见明显投档断档历史记录；拥有16个A-及以上学科，其中航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、材料科学与工程、仪器科学与技术、管理科学与工程等6个学科获评A+，学科实力位居全国顶尖，对理工类考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心招生专业社会热度持续高热（2024年高热推荐），人工智能相关方向关注度上升；山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人，考生基数扩大加剧了全省范围内的录取竞争；北航位于北京市，非本省高校；2025年在山东省综合类招生152人，占该校当年全国招生计划一定比例；北京作为一线城市对山东考生具有较强地域吸引力，但无本省高校的地缘优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次反弹至4673名、2026年招生计划持平、学校排名持续攀升（软科第11名）及优势学科实力强劲等正面因素，与2026年山东考生总数明显增加、声誉负面舆情等竞争加剧因素相权衡，预计2026年最低录取位次与2025年基准较2025年基准略有前移（竞争略缓和）；预测最低位次约4643名，区间4143–5143名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（4143–5143名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如4200名以内）可重点冲刺一档的未来空天领军计划、计算机拔尖计划等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如5000名以外）建议以二档的计算与智能科学类、信息科学与技术类为核心目标，同时确保三档的航空航天类作为稳妥选择。社会科学试验班位次要求明显较低，适合位次偏后的考生考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 2298, 2959, 4173, 5198, and 4673 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 2900 places; in 2025, compared to 2024, there was a significant rebound of about 525 places, indicating a recovery signal. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4673. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shandong Province was stable at 157–159 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 152 in 2025, and maintained at 152 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising: 15th in 2021, 14th in 2023, 12th in 2024, 11th in 2025, and 11th in 2026, firmly in the top 20 of China's top engineering institutions, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving mentor misconduct and academic integrity incidents (the Yang Yun incident), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. No significant history of enrollment gaps. It has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 6 A+ disciplines: Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering, placing its academic strength at the national top, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly popular (highly recommended in 2024), with increasing attention on AI-related directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 from about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition across the province. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university. In 2025, it enrolled 152 students in the comprehensive category in Shandong, accounting for a certain proportion of its national enrollment plan. As a first-tier city, Beijing has strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates, but lacks the geographical advantage of a local university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering positive factors such as the ranking rebound to 4673 in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, continuously rising university ranking (11th in Soft Science), and strong advantages in key disciplines, balanced against intensified competition factors like a significant increase in the total number of Shandong candidates in 2026 and negative reputation incidents, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher (competition slightly eased) compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4643, with a range of 4143–5143.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (4143–5143), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4200), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors like Future Aerospace Leading Plan and Computer Top-Notch Plan. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 5000), it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors like Computing and Intelligent Science and Information Science and Technology as core goals, while ensuring Tier 3 majors like Aerospace and Aviation as a safe choice. Social Science Experimental Class has significantly lower ranking requirements, suitable for candidates with lower rankings.
